entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized cryptocurrency platform founded in 2014 and operated by Hako Technology Pte. Ltd., providing digital-payment-token services under a Monetary Authority of Singapore Major Payment Institution licence.
entity.notes: Official Coinhako material establishes the 2014 founding year. Hako Technology Pte. Ltd. received a Major Payment Institution licence for digital-payment-token services in May 2022 and remains listed in the MAS Financial Institutions Directory.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Coinhako brand.

changes.summary: Singapore-based centralized cryptocurrency platform founded in 2014 and operated by Hako Technology Pte. Ltd., providing digital-payment-token services under a Monetary Authority of Singapore Major Payment Institution licence.
changes.notes: Official Coinhako material establishes the 2014 founding year. Hako Technology Pte. Ltd. received a Major Payment Institution licence for digital-payment-token services in May 2022 and remains listed in the MAS Financial Institutions Directory.

events.title: Coinhako was founded in Singapore in 2014
events.description: Coinhako was founded in Singapore in 2014 as a cryptocurrency platform focused on providing regional access to digital assets.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: MAS granted Coinhako a Major Payment Institution licence
events.description: The Monetary Authority of Singapore granted Hako Technology Pte. Ltd., trading as Coinhako, a Major Payment Institution licence covering digital-payment-token services.
events.notes: The event date follows Coinhako's public announcement. The current MAS directory continues to list the licence and covered services.

evidence.title: About Coinhako
evidence.notes: Official company profile states that Coinhako was founded in 2014 by Yusho Liu and Gerry Eng.

evidence.title: Coinhako 2014 year-end review
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous official year-end post documents Coinhako's operation during 2014.

evidence.title: MAS awards Coinhako with Major Payment Institution licence
evidence.notes: Official announcement identifies Hako Technology Pte. Ltd. and the licence for digital-payment-token services.

evidence.title: MAS Financial Institutions Directory entry for Hako Technology Pte. Ltd.
evidence.notes: The regulator directory lists Hako Technology Pte. Ltd., trading as Coinhako, as a Major Payment Institution for digital-payment-token and cross-border money-transfer services.

evidence.title: Coinhako official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Coinhako identity and active platform.
